subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore potential partnership opportunities between our teams.

We have the following slots available for a 30-minute call next week, all between 14:00–16:00 UTC:
- April 21, 2026
- April 22, 2026
- April 23, 2026

Please let us know which of these times works best for you, and we'll send a calendar invite right away.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we are unable to share internal contact information externally. All collaboration inquiries should be directed through this email address, and we will ensure the appropriate team members are included in discussions as we progress. General information about our leadership team is also available on our public website.

Looking forward to our discussion!

Best regards,
